name: apex
description: Code coverage & security analysis for 11 languages. Coverage gaps, CWE-mapped security findings, reverse path reachability, deployment confidence scores.
author: allexdav2

tools.name: apex_run
tools.description: Run coverage analysis on a project

tools.name: apex_detect
tools.description: Run security detectors with CWE mappings

tools.name: apex_reach
tools.description: Find entry points reaching a code location
